dailyOutages.plant: About 54 MW interruption occurred under Rangpur, Kurigram & Lalmonirhat S/S from 4:03 hr to 4:26 hr as Baropukuria 230/132 kv T-1 (Relay E/F), Saidpur - Rangpur line-1
dailyOutages.reason: About 54 MW interruption occurred under Rangpur, Kurigram & Lalmonirhat S/S from 4:03 hr to 4:26 hr as Baropukuria 230/132 kv T-1 (Relay E/F), Saidpur - Rangpur line-1 tripped (Dist. Z-1,2, 3) from Saidpur & line-2 from both ends (Dist Z-1,2,3) Rangpur Confidence - Rangpur S/S line - 1 & 2 tripped from PP end (Dist. Z-3, 3-phase). Again the same tripping occurred at the time (5:18 hrs) of giving a trial of Saidpur - Rangpur line-2 & restored at 5:38 hrs.
dailyOutages.full_desc: About 54 MW interruption occurred under Rangpur, Kurigram & Lalmonirhat S/S from 4:03 hr to 4:26 hr as Baropukuria 230/132 kv T-1 (Relay E/F), Saidpur - Rangpur line-1 tripped (Dist. Z-1,2, 3) from Saidpur & line-2 from both ends (Dist Z-1,2,3) Rangpur Confidence - Rangpur S/S line - 1 & 2 tripped from PP end (Dist. Z-3, 3-phase). Again the same tripping occurred at the time (5:18 hrs) of giving a trial of Saidpur - Rangpur line-2 & restored at 5:38 hrs.
